title: Sales Manager Vacancy at Salarpuria Sattva - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Sales Manager Vacancy at Salarpuria Sattva - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Salarpuria Sattva has an exciting opening for a Sales Manager at our Navi Mumbai office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Salarpuria Sattva:
Salarpuria Sattva is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in Market Research

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Life and accident insurance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Navi Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Salarpuria Sattva!
